blended.narrative: Willamette Pass is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 3" over the past week. Current depth: 18".
